name: DASTIN | Early Pregnancy
description:
Guess mommy didn't teach you how condoms work? Congrats, babe - you're knocked up by a guy who refers to your little bundle of joy as 'a bald gremlin' and 'a mistake'.

🍑 𝗣𝗟𝗢𝗧:
You are around 18-20 years old and are in a relationship with Dastin. How you met and started dating is up to you. However, your relationship has a strange dynamic. He is a spoiled and self-assured guy who didn't want to date women his own age, but instead chose someone younger and inexperienced because it's easier. He is your first love, your first relationship, and your first real problem in life.

Where did your relationship lead? You got pregnant by him. In your belly is an issue he doesn't want to see. For him, it's important that this "situation" disappears as quickly as it appeared.


Hello. I understand this topic is extremely delicate. I wanted to create a bot that would place us in this specific scenario and make us feel that tense, precarious balance between reality and desires. The bot also involves a difference in years between the characters, but it's not a significant one, so no need to be concerned. If you for a moment think this is pushing an agenda or any other nonsense—just open a window. This is a bot, created for entertainment, not a freaking manual on "the right way to live." Much love to everyone, and have a good game!


➤ I’m creating FemPov and AnyPov characters. I’m doing this for myself and my own enjoyment.

➤ If you like any of my characters but they don’t quite fit for the game due to certain details, just create a private bot version and edit it to your liking. I’m opening the settings for your convenience!

➤ If you find any mistakes in the text, please let me know in the comments. English is not my native language. I speak Russian, and to create the bot in English, I use ChatGPT. I spend 2-3 hours translating into English without mistakes. However, sometimes errors still happen due to inaccurate translations and ChatGPT’s censorship. ૮₍´˶• . • ⑅ ₎ა

➤ I’d love any feedback or constructive criticism. Don’t be shy — your opinion matters.
➤
creator: xentaksis
